text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! What should we ride next? The Ferris
wheel? A roller coaster?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Look over there, Mayano! I see something
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Fly High as a VR Pilot?! Looks fun! Let's give it a
whirl!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
...All right, pilots! Your mission—avoid enemy fire
and return safely to base!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ratatatata! Look at these small fry! Did they really think I'd fall for a trap like that?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Incredible work! ☆ You're like some kind of
mind-reading super genius. ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? If you just imagine what they're seeing, it's
pretty easy to predict—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, wait a second. Maybe I could use this
strategy in races too!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! ☆ That was so fun! ★ What should we
do next?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Marvey! I just really wanna go race right
now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
An idea struck me like an enemy missile earlier.
Now I wanna try reading my opponents in a race!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Is that a challenge?! What a marvelous
idea! ☆ I accept. ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Thanks so much! Let's hurry back to the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun and Marvelous Sunday
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result of her epiphany at the theme park, all
of Mayano Top Gun's racing skills increase!
